review_title: Awesome support
author: Plamen T.
pros: The support is awesome. [sensitive content hidden] did great job to support me with various scenarios regarding email automation that I aimed to achieve. At the end it was working.
cons: The UI can be a bit complex to navigate. The support is doing a great job to easy the use of the software.

review_title: Simvoly is all in one solution for effective sales funnels and marketing campaings
description: I use the landing page builder and sales funnel builder both for my own business to generate new sales leads and for my customers. There is also a white label that gives additional options for monetisation.
author: Silvia G.
pros: The great feature for what I choose Simvoly is One-click upsell. This functionality gives me the opportunity to increase the average sales sum and makes me more profit from one customer. This is the cheapest way to make a bigger profit.
cons: Simvoly is a great tool for little products. If you want to sell hundreds of products or to have a real online store is better to choose a different platform There is no option for XML import of a bunch of products.

review_title: Great in theory, very poor in practice
description: Pretty poor. It started off great, but once I began to actually test things out, it went downhill from there.
author: Chad V.
pros: I like the templates, which are clean, modern and beautiful.
cons: The software just isn't up to the competition. For example, Simvoly has an excellent course template page. However, there's no way to upload material to the actual course. And their membership feature also leaves a lot to be desired as it's just clunky and convoluted overall.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great features and easy to use! Just a few problems
description: Very good if you are designing a simple business website that needs features such as a blog, scheduling, forms, a store, etc. They are so easy to customize that anyone can figure them out, even with no design or coding experience. If you are looking for a website with a very custom design and not just the templates they provide, things can get difficult. It can be done but there are a lot of glitches and problems that come with trying to design it yourself. And they will eventually help you solve these problems but it can take weeks or months for them to do so.
author: Lili M.
pros: We absolutely love all of the features that come with Simvoly, especially the blog, forms, and scheduling. They are so easy to use and customize and they work very well. The design templates are great for those with no experience in design or for those who want a faster option. Even without the templates, there is lots of customization for the design which is great. Also, the tutorials are nice and quick, and very informative.
cons: Customer service is great for answering questions, but very slow if you have an issue that is hard to fix. It can take over a week for them to respond on some things if they are not simple fixes. Sometimes it takes multiple weeks depending on what the issue is, which is a huge problem. Also, they often expect me to know how to write custom code, and ask me to put it in myself to fix simple issues even though they are capable of putting the code in themselves. I believe this platform was designed for people who don't know how to code, so this is a problem. Additionally, the website design often does not come out looking the same as it does on the website builder. Most of the time it is minor differences but it makes it hard to design sometimes and you have to be very careful and check everything you do. The way that they have engineered the mobile and tablet editing also needs to be changed. The design on desktop does not carry over well in a lot of cases, and in these cases, you basically need to design the same page three times: one for desktop, one for tablet, one for mobile. And in the future, for every edit you make, you need to make it three different times, one for each device. It is very time-consuming. I believe they should improve the responsiveness of their design so you don't need to make these changes in the first place.

review_title: Hands Down my favorite Web Builder
description: I've been using the software for over 2 years now and I don't plan on making a switch anytime soon.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I've tried almost every web builder under the sun. I've been building websites for over 10 years now and when I discovered this software the game changed. It's simple, it's affordable and it's packed with features. They're constantly coming out with new updates.
cons: The only con I can think of right now is initially, It's a little confusing to figure out where a lot of the settings are including creating anchors for your page as an example.

review_title: Feature rich, easy to use and packed with possibilities
description: From day one I have loved the Simvoly system and their great support and service team. As a web developer and funnel creator it's important for me to work with systems that not only suits my needs but also my clients needs. Simvoly fills my customers and my own needs very well. It provides me with tools to make reality of my customers ideas and wishes.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Great system with many useful features. It's easy and quick to work with. The time from an idea to a product to show my client is short. That gives me freedom and the client gets a good picture of what we can achive together.
cons: Looking forward to the integrated email system and the web shop update the Simvoly team are working so hard on.

review_title: Shopping Cart Functionality for Digital Products
description: Good but taking longer to set up than what I had anticipated. That is partly because of the size of my site that I am moving over from Wordpress.
author: Doug L.
pros: I sell low-ticket video tutorials (membership login access) , and I want my customers to have the ability to pick and choose only the ones they want, using add-to-cart functionality. This type of configuration is pretty standard for hard-goods ecomerce stores, but not so common for digital products. Simvoly does allow me to set up this type of web-site.
cons: This SAAS Platform is fairly young, and therefore, is still working towards developing all more granular features that come standard with larger competitors. Things like being able to customize the user experience in the customer dashboard, as well as integrations with third-party services.
author_profession: Co-Owner. Web Video Production & Information Marketing. Business Development. Entrepreneur.

review_title: Soffistcated Platform- Leaves Wix & WP in the dust
description: Te proprietor is always available and responds very fast, tons of learning materials about how to succeed with the platform. 5 Stars.
author: Blake B.
pros: The UI (User Interface) is beyond superior to wix, wp, squarespace, etc its so much more user friendly and no detail, no ability to make the slightest modification was overlooked. Alot of thought went in to its ease of use. Ive been working with builders since front page in the 90s. Trust me when I say this is a superior platform.
cons: You must upgrade to 3rd tier ($59)billing to do reoccurring billing for your monthly subscriptions.

review_title: Easy to use and time-saving, more than just a landing page builder
author: Donatas J.
pros: I find it easy to use and time-saving. Membership management is really great feature, so Simvoly is not just another one landing page builder. It's a tool that I use to validate multiple startup ideas and to prebuild a list of potential customers.
cons: Not everything is intuitively clear (at least for me), but their support is awesome - I got all answers and help very quickly (a meter of minutes!)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Innovation and stability
description: I initially signed up for a free trial with Simvoly and used their free academy to build my first website. Anytime I had questions, the support team was there to help. Now, I've built several websites, funnels, and courses for myself and clients, and I’m very pleased with both the personal and financial rewards. Overall, it’s been an excellent experience.
author: Tim A.
pros: What I like most about Simvoly is how it perfectly balances innovation and stability. It's simple to use and powerful. The support team is awesome, they make me look good. My clients love the user experience. When my clients are happy, I make money and that makes me happy.
cons: Not applicable. Simvoly has not let me down in any way.

review_title: Humans Behind The Support Desk - Keep It Up!
description: After purchasing the product about 4 years ago, it still rocks.
author: Eileen S.
pros: The speed of response from their support desk is superb! I work in Asia, specifically GMT+8 hrs and when I needed help with logging into my website, someone from the support desk, NOT A BOT, responded to my message, within a minute and got it resolved in the 1st go.
cons: Simvoly keeps improving and adding new features, which is great but I hope our original plan does not get downgraded.

review_title: critique de l'application Simvoly
author: Chris A.
pros: c'est un logiciel pratique dans un gestion marketing doué avec la plateforme accessible facilement et l'environnement adéquat.
cons: pas grand problème sur l'application sauf qu'elle n'est pas gratuite donc pour la tester il faut payer
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Simvoly is one of the best Web Builder
description: Overall, I am extremely pleased with this product because it is simple to use. These are where I originally honed my landing page skills. This tool is simple to set up, and they have excellent chat support teams that are available around-the-clock. If you don't know something, just ask and they'll tell you.
author: Feberline P.
pros: The drag and drop interface of these website tools makes it very easy for non-designers to learn how to use the features of this site. This is also designed for e-commerce websites because it has capabilities for digital downloads, site statistics, and the ability to switch themes without having to start from scratch.
cons: The lack of a free trial, the absence of photo editing features, and the absence of shipping service connections are drawbacks of this software. But perhaps they will be able to create these fantastic qualities in the future.
author_profession: Google Web Story Creator. VA Amazon Product Researcher | Data Analyst | Transcriptionist | Website a

review_title: Really nice and easy builder
description: Helped me create my online store in no time. Best website builder I've seen.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It is fast and intuitive. I use Simvoly for my online shop. In it, I found everything I needed without any struggles. I will keep using the service for a long time. I am really happy with the overall experience with Simvoly.
cons: Nothing, it works great! I had no issues with Simvoly so far.

review_title: Move beyond templates
author: Gary H.
pros: I wanted a site builder that gave more flexibility in design beyond templates like so many companies offer now. I felt limited by Shopify, SquareSpace, and the like. I have some web design background and found Simvoly offered what I wanted. You can customize your pages far beyond any template builder. And the nice thing is that if you're not wanting to spend a ton of time on design, they have plenty of templates to choose from as a starting point. Their site builder is easy to get around and allows you to edit both the mobile and desktop version of the site. And the price is fantastic for the amount of functionality you get!
cons: Their integration game is pretty weak right now. If you're selling stuff, you'll need to use outside sources. It would be nice to see them integrate with a shipping provider like PirateShip or ShipStation. And for customer retention, it would be nice to see an integration with Yotpo or Refersion.

review_title: I love the design and functionality of my new website
description: I am so happy with their customer support. Every time I didn't know something, they always helped me in minutes!
author: Stella S.
pros: I was looking for a possibility to build a website, an online shop, a funnel, and a membership site. Simvoly has all that and even much more to offer for a relatively small price!
cons: I wished, there would be also SMS marketing integrated, not only Email marketing.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Happy With Simvoly for a Small Web Design Agency
description: There customer support has also been very good. They are prompt and attentive and i've had no problems getting questions/issues resolved.
author: Nathan A.
pros: Simvoly is a nice one stop shop option for someone who needs to make lots of small non-wordpress sites for clients or themselves. The white label option has very competitive pricing plans to other white label builders. This helps small operators like myself to get a profitable sideline on non-wordpress sites. White I like is that I can hire people to make websites for me who do not necessarily know how to write HTML, CSS, etc. This is a money saver.
cons: There are some minor UX issues, and occasional small glitches in the builder, but nothing that impedes productivity once you learn the platform. The learning curve is not too bad overall - you can be up and running making a website quickly.

review_title: So Creative
author: Laurie C.
pros: It was very easy to use. Someone who has never even thought they could build a website, was able to get it completed with Simvoly. They have so many videos to answer questions.
cons: It took me about three weeks of trying to use it to finally figure it out. But once I did, it was very easy to use.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Simply the best
author: Griffin S.
pros: Simvoly's website builder is the best I have messed with. Support is amazing, and the elegant drag n drop style they created makes building websites simple.
cons: No cons with Simvoly at this time. They are a fairly new company, and I expect more integrations to come, but what they have is stellar.

review_title: A good website builder
description: Simvoly gives unlimited group members and an unlimited bandwidth which is a good choice for a better website.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I loved using Simvoly which I am using for my small personal project. Simvoly is superbly fast and easy to create a website. They have many themes of the website which we want to create.
cons: The E-commerce side of Simvoly allows only 100 products, this is not really a con other than that I love Simvoly.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Value for Money Website Builder + Funnels
author: Nicole L.
pros: I'm able to create any website and funnels within a few mins, this is insane
cons: Not I can know off as a heavy user for Simvoly

review_title: Great product
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Ease of use, responsive support, design flexibility
cons: Nothing to say here really

review_title: Super slick and easy to use
description: I got a slick consulting website setup within a few hours and although other tools are currently more feature rich, the well chosen options keeps me on track and actually makes my website builds quicker!
author: Stephen C.
pros: Simvoly has great pre built templates but is also easy to use to build from scratch! I've used a few drag and drop builders and this is the easiest one I've used! It also has slick animations to allow sections of your website to slide in like the high end tech websites!
cons: More integrations needed but updates have been coming regularly so just more time needed!

review_title: Love this software
author: Meaghan H.
pros: The ease of use is amazing along with the ability to customize everything.
cons: I haven't found any cons involving the software yet.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Customer service response time is 2 minutes!!!
description: It's just amazing. I love it.
author: María Adriana C.
pros: I have never seen such incredible customer service and tech support as this. I'm asking stuff almost daily and they respond immediately. They cover everything and even if not they are very helpful and sign post me to where I need to go. I've learnt tonnes in the 2 years I've been on this platform. My website and especially my scheduler that is branded and not Calendly like everyone else's makes me look sooooo professional and it makes me really mean my business. Even for this one feature I recommend it. My secure payments on the shop are incredible, I can even take monthly membership payments from all around the world which I do and this engenders great security for my clients.
cons: I would love it to be more affordable for myself as a solopreneur so I'm offering the affiliate program out now because I stand by the quality.
